Metadata.ExomizerCommand: exomizer sfx 0xC000 "DELIVERANCE-STORMLORDII-SIDE2-C000" -Di_irq_exit=0 -s "inc $d030 lsr $d011" -f "w1: bit $d011 bpl w1 w2: bit $d011 bmi w2 jsr $fda3 rol $d011 lda #$35 sta $01 dec $d030" -x "inc $d020" -o "Deliverance - Stormlord II (Levels 3 and 4) (J1).prg"
Metadata.Notes: Made the following changes: 1. NOP'd out the JSR $C134 at $C081 to remove the score code entry needed to start the game (the score code is provided at the end of level two) 2. Set $521F to $08 to give the same number of lives as at the start of level one (this has to be done because this number would ordinarily be derived from the entered score code) 3. Set $5220 to $10 to give 16 fairies (this has to be done because this number would ordinarily be derived from the entered score code)
